title: PayPal Holdings Inc PYPL Q3 2023 Earnings: 8% Revenue Growth And 20% EPS Growth
text: PayPal demonstrated solid operational results in Q3 2023. Total payment volume grew 15% to $387.7 billion. Net revenues of $7.4 billion represented an 8% increase compared to prior year. Non-GAAP EPS achieved a 20% increase from $1.08 in Q3 2022 to $1.30. Operating income grew 8% to $1.6 billion. PayPal maintained $15.4 billion in cash, cash equivalents and investments. Generated free cash flow of $1.1 billion during the quarter. For Q4 2023, PayPal projects non-GAAP earnings per diluted share growth of approximately 10%.
